title: Group Life Cover
definition: This covers the entire organisation. The policy owner is the employer. It covers natural risk and natural causes of the individuals declared by the organisation. This includes: natural death, critical illness, permanent disability, and funeral expenses. Who is this product for? It's suitable for any organisation of a minimum of 5 persons is eligible to have a Group Life Cover.
